fields.name: title
values: Auth service error rate above threshold
Cache cluster latency returned to normal

fields.name: content
values: Inbound requests crossed 18k rpm on gateway-02. Autoscaling added two pods and response time remains within SLO.
Primary SQL node switched to db-replica-01 after a health check failure. Write traffic is stable and replication is healthy.
Backup job backup-prod-01 completed successfully. Archive uploaded to object storage and retention policy verification passed.
Auth.Api returned elevated 5xx responses after the latest rollout. Rollback completed and the incident is under active review.
Security patch deployment is in progress for app nodes in the production cluster. Short reconnects may occur during restarts.
Redis cluster latency dropped back under 10 ms after rebalancing. Monitoring remains enabled for the next maintenance window.
